critical_weaknesses.title: Severe cohort/protocol confounding likely explains the high AUC
critical_weaknesses.detail: All 170 PH cases are contrast-enhanced; many nonPH are plain-scan CT. AUC ~0.95 may be protocol classification, not disease.
critical_weaknesses.fix_direction: Protocol-balanced analyses: contrast-only PH vs contrast-only nonPH, site/scanner-stratified splits, acquisition-protocol prediction controls.

critical_weaknesses.title: No independent validation / leakage-resistant splits
critical_weaknesses.detail: Internal 5-fold CV only. No patient-level grouping verification, no held-out test, possible multiple scans per patient crossing folds.
critical_weaknesses.fix_direction: Locked patient-level splits, external or temporal validation, freeze preprocessing before test.

critical_weaknesses.title: Graph construction insufficiently validated anatomically
critical_weaknesses.detail: No overlay audits or morphometric comparisons; TEASAR params assumed correct without sensitivity analysis.
critical_weaknesses.fix_direction: Per-structure overlays, blinded QC, skeleton-to-mask coverage, radius/diameter calibration.

critical_weaknesses.title: Feature engineering defects (voxel-space, ct_density=0, Strahler-approx)
critical_weaknesses.detail: Centroid-relative position in voxel index space, orientation in index space, ct_density hardcoded 0, Strahler without cycle handling.
critical_weaknesses.fix_direction: Physical-mm coordinates, cycle detection, corrected schema before rerun.

critical_weaknesses.title: QC and exclusions are ad hoc and potentially label-biased
critical_weaknesses.detail: vox_per_key>2000, mask_vox>100k + num_nodes<100 are arbitrary; 27 placeholder nonPH excluded changes class balance; airway never hard-failed.
critical_weaknesses.fix_direction: Predefined QC, exclusion counts by label/protocol, sensitivity analysis, manual audit.

critical_weaknesses.title: Statistics underpowered, multiplicity uncontrolled
critical_weaknesses.detail: Many arms/configs compared without nested CV or multiple-comparison correction; v1->v2 AUC jump lacks CIs, DeLong/bootstrap.
critical_weaknesses.fix_direction: Nested CV or locked test, bootstrap/DeLong CIs, paired comparisons, multiplicity correction.

critical_weaknesses.title: Airway claims unsupportable
critical_weaknesses.detail: 47 airway rebuild: only 41/47 valid (2 invalid, 4 errored). No airway QC. arm_b v2 AUCs unstable.
critical_weaknesses.fix_direction: Either remove airway claims or rebuild with dedicated QC + visual validation + complete all failed cases.

critical_weaknesses.title: Reproducibility package incomplete
critical_weaknesses.detail: kimimaro version not pinned, no env lockfile, no case manifest/splits/commit hash, no one-command rebuild.
critical_weaknesses.fix_direction: Release code, env lockfile, immutable manifests, fold assignments, cache-builder commit/hash, raw result JSONs.

strengths: Mask extraction bug correctly identified and sentinel-based fix is directionally reasonable.
Report exposes QC fields, cache formats, and known limitations.
arm_a vessel-only v2 fold AUC ~0.96 is internally strong but not yet credible as disease performance.
history.reviewer_notes_for_memory: Central threat is acquisition/source confounding: all PH=contrast-enhanced, many nonPH=plain-scan -> AUC ~0.95 may be protocol leakage. Airway claims are no-go. Round 2 must show protocol-balanced + patient-level + locked validation + QC + reproducibility manifests.

notes: Round 1 complete. Next: apply fixes for W4/W7/W8 that can be done now (doc-level) + queue W1 protocol-confound analysis once arm_b/arm_c training finishes. W2/W3/W5/W6 require user decisions.
